arts.ttl: Bayern Munich ready to go into debt to fight Manchester City for Florian Wirtz
arts.sum: Bild reports that Bayern Munich are ready to go into debt as they try to sign Bayer Leverkusen’s Florian Wirtz in the summer. Bayern want to sign Wirtz this summer, and…

arts.ttl: Borussia Mönchengladbach linked with attackers Benedict Hollerbach and Fabian Rieder
arts.sum: Borussia Mönchengladbach are currently being linked with two Bundesliga professionals.

arts.ttl: Union Berlin striker Andrej Ilic speaks on rift with Bo Svensson: “He never talked to me.”
arts.sum: Union Berlin loanee Andrej Ilic revealed that he would have left his Bundesliga side had previous trainer Bo Svensson not been sacked.
